<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Add a vector Random Feature (RF) emulator to the Cloudy example (in addition to the already existing emulator options of a scalar Random Feature emulator and a Gaussian Process emulator)


## To-do

- [x] Update docs to include vector RF case

## Content
- [x] Implement vector RF case

title: Add vector RF case to Cloudy example
